items.name: [Y2K] Punk Goth Garter Strap Denim Shorts
items.description:
More by ZZIDOLYEE https://www.roblox.com/catalog?taxonomy=tZsUsd2BqGViQrJ9Vs3Wah&CreatorName=ZZIDOLYEE&salesTypeFilter=1

Y2K punk-style shorts featuring bold garter strap details. The eyelet accents and detachable straps maximize the hip and dark aesthetic vibe. Perfect for completing a unique goth or street-style look, whether worn alone or paired with leg warmers.
